## Summary

Describe the potential security concern.

## Impact

Who or what could be affected, and how?

## Reproduction Steps

Provide step-by-step reproduction details when possible.

## Suggested Mitigation

If known, describe a possible fix or control.

## Sensitive Details

If details are sensitive, email hello@privent.ai instead of posting publicly.
